'''Lope''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was described as being large and muscular enough to be a [[Smashball/Legends|smashball]] player. He was a veteran of the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]]. After the war, he became a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]]; his specialty was melee weapons, although he was equally proficient at both short-range and sniper [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] usage.

After he became wanted for murder on [[Sacorria]], Lope stayed out of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], working along the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]], eventually winding up on [[Karfeddion/Legends|Karfeddion]] around [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. There, [[Arwen Cohl]] hired him to participate in the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]] attack on the [[Eriadu Trade Summit]], where, after a brief struggle with [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], he was captured.

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1st}}
